goal: Add a side-effect-free cockpit projection adoption contract that converts BPK-007 readiness and BPK-008 runtime integration status into a deterministic cockpit model for later UI consumption. Do not add frontend files, routes, runtime calls, provider calls, database writes, GitHub writes, package changes, or deployment changes.
scope_out: Do not add or change frontend, CSS, HTML, React, server routes, or browser-visible files.
Do not call runtime dispatch, providers, GitHub, database, maya-core, or external services.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, or deployment instructions.
Do not change BPK-007 or BPK-008 semantics.
claims: A cockpit model can be generated deterministically from readiness and runtime integration contracts.
Blocked and review states remain renderable for operator inspection but do not become executable.
The adoption contract is side-effect-free and tested independently.
assumptions: BPK-007 and BPK-008 are committed and available as pure data contracts.
Actual UI implementation needs later visual evidence and belongs to a separate block.
Cockpit adoption means a data model, not a rendered screen, in this block.
dod: builder/src/cockpitProjectionAdoptionContract.ts exports side-effect-free cockpit adoption types and function.
The function returns ready, review, blocked, or invalid adoption status with deterministic panels.
Blocked/review projections remain inspectable but never executable.
builder/tests/cockpitProjectionAdoptionContract.test.ts covers ready, review, blocked renderable, task mismatch, and no-mutation behavior.
review-packets/BPK-009.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused cockpit adoption test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A visible UI, server route, runtime call, provider call, database write, GitHub write, deployment change, or package change becomes necessary.
Changing BPK-007 or BPK-008 behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-008 classified runtime adoption without opening runtime. BPK-009 should create a cockpit-consumable projection contract without building the UI.
